description: Go CLI tool — multi-package, interfaces, functional options pattern, implicit interface implementation
known_limitations: Implicit interface implementation not detected: LocalRunner implements Runner, JSONFormatter implements Formatter — no IMPLEMENTS relationship
Go package-level import resolution works (cmd -> internal/config) but relies on unique-global (0.8) for cross-package calls like NewJSONFormatter
Functional options pattern (Option type + WithXxx functions) detected as individual functions — the pattern itself is not recognized as a relationship
Embed struct pattern not tested in this fixture
